explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: Sources describe documented external accountability practices in 1 source(s). Additional documentation references related practices.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, Williams Companies' Form 10-K Annual Report for Fiscal Year 2024, provides evidence for **governance** and **external_accountability**. The report highlights the company's awareness of AI-related cybersecurity risks to its IT infrastructure and industrial control systems, implying a need for governance and security policies. While it mentions "enterprise AI initiatives" under the CIO's expertise, suggesting an AI focus within governance, it lacks specific execution details.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report for Fiscal Year 2024

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The Form 10-K Annual Report highlights the company's awareness of AI-related cybersecurity risks to its IT infrastructure and industrial control systems. The report also mentions "enterprise AI initiatives" under the CIO's expertise, suggesting an AI focus within governance.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, Williams Companies' Form 10-K Annual Report for Fiscal Year 2024, provides evidence for **governance** and **external_accountability**. The report highlights the company's awareness of AI-related cybersecurity risks to its IT infrastructure and industrial control systems, implying a need for governance and security policies. While it mentions "enterprise AI initiatives" under the CIO's expertise, suggesting an AI focus within governance, it lacks specific execution details.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report for Fiscal Year 2024

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The Databricks customer story highlights the AI system's capability to discover opportunities. It also mentions the AI system's validated accuracy, suggesting a level of understanding of its underlying logic and performance.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This Databricks customer story provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. The case study highlights the AI system's capability to discover opportunities and mentions its validated accuracy, suggesting a level of understanding of the AI's underlying logic and performance.
relevant_sources.title: Databricks Customer Story: Williams Companies

summary.overall_findings: Williams Companies' Form 10-K Annual Report highlights awareness of AI-related cybersecurity risks to its IT infrastructure and industrial control systems, reflecting practices within the governance pillar. External accountability is also addressed through documented practices, bringing the total to 2 of 7 evaluated pillars with public evidence, based on 4 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
